name: 英雄竞起:三国
short_description: The world is in chaos, heroes are rising, and the public is a high-ranking official. We must take the collection of heroes as our heart, and we can help the Han dynasty and save the people.
detailed_description:
Heroes of War is set in the Three Kingdoms period, and the game perfectly showcases 409 cities in 64 counties, 13 provinces, and 13 provinces of ancient China using 16 different terrains of 200000 grids. It also includes multiple exploration areas such as the four major foreign races, Japan, and Yizhou. Players can play as a faction and explore and simulate strategies through the world map, as well as engage in real-time battles with generals and troops on 23 different battlefield maps.
Players need to develop their power through internal, military, diplomatic and other means.
In terms of domestic affairs, players need to build cities, recruit generals, develop the economy, and build defenses;
In terms of military affairs, players need to cultivate generals, upgrade troops, occupy cities, use strategies, and engage in battlefield battles;
In terms of diplomacy, players can form alliances, trade, and declare war with other forces.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
